office_does: A U.S. representative serves a two-year term, legislates and votes in the House, conducts oversight, and provides constituent services.
race_blurb: Incumbent Marilyn Strickland faces five challengers. Adam Arafat supplies a health-care and accountability platform, Alex Scheel emphasizes housing justice and anti-war policy, and the remaining challengers have sparse dossier evidence.

candidates.summary: A challenger supporting universal health care, prescription-cost reductions, mental-health access, corporate tax enforcement, and public performance reporting.
highlights: Supports universal health care and lower prescription-drug prices [S2]
Supports expanded mental-health access and corporate tax enforcement [S2]
Rejects corporate PAC contributions and favors measurable public reporting [S2]

taxes.basis: Supports stronger corporate tax enforcement as a revenue and fairness tool.

spending.basis: Supports expanded mental-health access and universal health coverage alongside cost reduction.

reform.basis: Rejects corporate PAC money and proposes measurable public accountability reporting.

candidates.summary: A progressive challenger whose documented platform centers housing justice and an anti-war foreign policy.
highlights: Campaigns as a progressive focused on housing justice [S2]

defense.basis: The dossier explicitly characterizes his foreign-policy platform as anti-war.

candidates.summary: A filed District 10 candidate for whom the reviewed dossier found no verifiable issue positions.
highlights: Identity was matched to the official candidate record [S1]
Policy axes are omitted because the dossier found no verifiable issue position [S1]

candidates.summary: The incumbent representative, with campaign materials emphasizing congressional tenure and institutional leadership.
highlights: Campaign materials emphasize her incumbent congressional role [S2]
Serves as Secretary of the Congressional Black Caucus [S2]

experience.basis: Runs on incumbent congressional service and Congressional Black Caucus leadership.
